location_precision.why: Every finding carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: Each defect is described in isolation with no compound failure mode connecting two of them mechanistically (e.g. the bare 'pass' at line 39 is never linked to another defect's persisting bad state).

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states a failure mechanism, such as 'mutable default argument seen=[] is shared across calls, so IDs accumulate and users synced in a later call are wrongly skipped as duplicates.'
